function f(f)return M[f+(-539342+544991)]end for f,X in ipairs({{-574636-(-574637);-266958+267349},{-281837+281838;757915+-757739},{-646084+646261,385158-384767}})do while X[570709+-570708]<X[288256+-288254]do M[X[-98827-(-98828)]],M[X[661057+-661055]],X[714881+-714880],X[-558134+558136]=M[X[173567-173565]],M[X[78132+-78131]],X[-689252+689253]+(-467636-(-467637)),X[697393+-697391]-(293722-293721)end end do local f=table.insert local X={o=545935+-545907;y=-137775-(-137832),["\050"]=-775447+775478,c=-108840-(-108857);z=-537886-(-537938);O=175754+-175706;i=635124-635066,l=-518356+518361;x=122430+-122370;U=419955-419943;R=-150476-(-150513),D=19465+-19403,T=-291910+291960,["\055"]=-262435+262458;t=-907047-(-907051);M=297273+-297272;G=-485183-(-485228);w=1002656-1002617;e=-240332+240345,A=212404+-212366;["\054"]=385272+-385263;m=9411-9392;J=-513460-(-513502),V=785392-785372;["\051"]=268170+-268127;["\057"]=67869+-67813,p=-601702-(-601755),k=-748587+748638,["\043"]=-132775+132786;g=862208-862186,j=942131+-942097,a=-7343-(-7370);S=-18468-(-18504);I=-713299-(-713340),r=67687+-67677,E=473144+-473111;W=-420332+420391;v=-985488-(-985502);["\056"]=-238050-(-238094),q=-197743-(-197797);B=841873-841867,s=623699+-623669,X=-771849+771874;["\052"]=286297+-286276,F=-728667+728675,["\047"]=641130-641106;Y=-1027871+1027889;b=-815865-(-815868);["\053"]=878760-878745,["\048"]=797209+-797169,K=46971+-46964;["\049"]=456483-456454,n=-679989+680044;C=-391702-(-391702);H=269588-269542;Q=-1010367+1010430;L=258494+-258445;f=-1038062-(-1038078),N=632854+-632793;P=414398-414366;Z=-315141+315188;h=864496-864470;u=497871+-497836,d=92262-92260}local T=M local x=string.char local u=string.sub local P=string.len local i=math.floor local h=type local l=table.concat for M=580141+-580140,#T,-684742+684743 do local t=T[M]if h(t)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local h=P(t)local v={}local c=722589+-722588 local D=433622+-433622 local A=-957745+957745 while c<=h do local M=u(t,c,c)local T=X[M]if T then D=D+T*(856429+-856365)^((680523-680520)-A)A=A+(363966+-363965)if A==-887367-(-887371)then A=152142+-152142 local M=i(D/(-851635+917171))local X=i((D%(-38765-(-104301)))/(-388191-(-388447)))local T=D%(60719-60463)f(v,x(M,X,T))D=107298+-107298 end elseif M=="\061"then f(v,x(i(D/(745725-680189))))if c>=h or u(t,c+(-362498+362499),c+(-728017-(-728018)))~="\061"then f(v,x(i((D%(112038+-46502))/(790030+-789774))))end break end c=c+(-193549+193550)end T[M]=l(v)end end end return(function(M,T,x,u,P,i,h,D,A,s,v,K,t,c,q,B,y,X,E,H,z,b,l)D,c,K,l,z,H,t,B,q,b,X,y,s,A,E,v=function(M)for f=-607230+607231,#M,28286+-28285 do t[M[f]]=(256292+-256291)+t[M[f]]end if x then local X=x(true)local T=P(X)T[f(-833574+828215)],T[f(321696+-327332)],T[f(484589+-490193)]=M,A,function()return-463842-192197 end return X else return u({},{[f(467997-473633)]=A,[f(-725810-(-720451))]=M;[f(-74080-(-68476))]=function()return-250304+-405735 end})end end,-574334-(-574334),function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(x,u)return X(M,{x,u},f,T)end return x end,{},function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(x,u,P)return X(M,{x,u;P},f,T)end return x end,function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(x)return X(M,{x},f,T)end return x end,{},function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(x,u,P,i,h)return X(M,{x;u,P,i,h},f,T)end return x end,function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(...)return X(M,{...},f,T)end return x end,function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(x,u,P,i,h,l)return X(M,{x;u,P;i,h,l},f,T)end return x end,function(X,x,u,P)local X=#P return T(h)end,function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function(x,u,P,i)return X(M,{x,u,P,i},f,T)end return x end,function(M,f)local T=D(f)local x=function()return X(M,{},f,T)end return x end,function(M)local f,X=705012-705011,M[-120519+120520]while X do t[X],f=t[X]-(535357-535356),(915017+-915016)+f if t[X]==-88622+88622 then t[X],l[X]=nil,nil end X=M[f]end end,function(M)t[M]=t[M]-(780268-780267)if-442292-(-442292)==t[M]then t[M],l[M]=nil,nil end end,function()c=c+(677889-677888)t[c]=-311255+311256 return c end return(q(705641+13238364,{}))(T(h))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(-503109-(-497540))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
